title: Basic JavaScript Animation Basics
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Animation Basics. Focus on implementing requestAnimationFrame loop correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Animation Basics
description: Create a function that uses requestAnimationFrame loop and Easing functions together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Animation Basics Project
description: Build a small application that applies requestAnimationFrame loop, Easing functions, CSS animations via JavaScript in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Animation Basics
description: The following code has bugs related to requestAnimationFrame loop. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Animation Basics
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with requestAnimationFrame loop and Easing functions.
